zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Peavey於1700年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德時，她的父親Edward Peavey35歲，母親Rachel Adams38歲。她於1719年2月2日與Richard Carter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾聶文頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1763年7月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛享年63歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Peavey于1700年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德时，她的父亲Edward Peavey35岁，母亲Rachel Adams38岁。她于1719年2月2日与Richard Carter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾聶文頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1763年7月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛享年63岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Peavey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English or Scottish: unexplained. Compare   Peavy  .
History: Edward Peavey is mentioned in the records of Portsmouth, NH, in1691, as well as Abell, Nathaniel, Joseph, William, and Peter Peavey(probably his sons).

variants.name: Pevey
meanings: Scottish or English: unexplained. Compare   Peavey  .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Peavey was born in 1700, in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, her father, Edward Peavey, was 35 and her mother, Rachel Adams, was 38. She married Richard Carter on 2 February 1719, in Newington, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 15 July 1763, in Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63, and was buried in Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Peavey est née en 1700, à Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edward Peavey, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Rachel Adams, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Carter le 2 février 1719, à Newington, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 juillet 1763, à Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Peavey 1700 in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Peavey 35 und ihre Mutter Rachel Adams 38. Sie hat am 2. Februar 1719 in Newington, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Richard Carter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juli 1763 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Peavey è nata il nel 1700 nel Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, sua padre, Edward Peavey, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Rachel Adams, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Richard Carter il 2 febbraio 1719, nel Newington, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1763, nel Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Peaveyが1700年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムグレエンランドで生まれた時，父Edward Peaveyは35歳，母Rachel Adamsは38歳であった。1719年2月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアニューイントンでRichard Carterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1763年7月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークシュアイアスカーボロウで63歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークシュアイアスカーボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Peavey(이)가 1700년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 그린랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Peavey(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rachel Adams(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1719년 2월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 뉴잉턴에서 Richard Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1763년 7월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 스카버루그h에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 스카버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Peavey nasceu em 1700, em Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, Edward Peavey, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Rachel Adams, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Carter em 2 de fevereiro de 1719, em Newington, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de julho de 1763, em Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Peavey родилась в 1700 г. в местности гринланд, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Edward Peavey было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Rachel Adams, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Carter 2 февраля 1719 г. в местности нюингтон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 15 июля 1763 г. в местности скарбороую, еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности скарбороую, еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Peavey nació en 1700, en Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Edward Peavey, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Rachel Adams, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Richard Carter el 2 de febrero de 1719, en Newington, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 15 de julio de 1763, en Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
